title: Capricorn Knot Wrap
description: Releasing as part of our Zodiac 2024 collection, Capricorn Knot Wrap is a reusable gift wrapping option, made from 100% recycled plastic bottles.

images.alt: Capricorn. A vibrant, square, fabric knot wrap. It is designed with a purple and blue border. The word "Capricorn" is arched in orange across the centre in bubble letters with a retro, groovy, mountain scene with a goat face profile on either side.

The image shows the colourful Capricorn fabric knot wrap suspended in front of a fresh, green, sparkling background. The knot wrap is facing forward showing the sheen of the fabric and vibrancy of colours.

The image shows the model in a pastel pink sweater on a fresh, green, sparkling background. They have used the Capricorn fabric knot wrap as gift wrapping which they have tied around a gift and knotted are are presenting to the camera.
A super close-up image of the zodiac-themed Capricorn knot wrap. The image focuses on the detail of the product material and the vibrancy of the colours.
